summary: 3 film announcements, 1 TV announcement across 5 trades.

film.title: Freddy the 13th
film.announcement: Dan Trachtenberg's untitled animated horror comedy 'Freddy the 13th' receives a release date.

film.title: Fabiola Gianotti Biopic
film.announcement: Director Stefano Mordini to helm a feature biopic about 'God Particle' physicist Fabiola Gianotti.

film.title: Mimpi Kita: Castle in the Air
film.announcement: Malaysian sci-fi film 'Mimpi Kita: Castle in the Air' lands distributor and sales agent Abnormal Studios.

tv.title: Trojan Horse
tv.announcement: Mediawan rolls out kinetic content gameshow 'Trojan Horse' across Europe.
